"~sh" is an implied net share estimate (|S$M value| ÷ that week's Friday close from Yahoo Finance) — an approximation of net shares, not exact broker-reported volume.
Select a ticker on the left to see its fund-flow history and signals.
These are data-driven observations derived purely from SGX's weekly institutional/retail fund-flow rankings (streaks, divergence, magnitude). They are not buy/sell recommendations or financial advice — use them as one input alongside your own research.
